description_long: This is a rustic wooden barn with a prominent gable roof covered in weathered shingles. The structure features open slatted fencing on one end, likely for ventilation or livestock access, and solid wooden siding on the other sides. One side of the barn has a small rectangular window and a simple horizontal bar, while the opposite side is fully enclosed with two large barn doors. The wood appears aged and rough, giving the barn a traditional, utilitarian appearance. The overall form is rectangular with a steeply pitched roof, typical of rural agricultural buildings. The barn is large enough to accommodate people, animals, or equipment inside.
description: A weathered wooden barn with a steep gable roof, open fencing on one end, and large double doors on the other. The structure features rustic siding and a small window on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing open slatted fencing beneath the gable roof, providing a clear entryway.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barn, with two large barn doors visible on the solid wooden siding.
description_view_2: Rear view with a fully enclosed wall under the gable roof, no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a small rectangular window and a horizontal bar on the wooden siding.
attribute_door_style: double hinged barn doors, two doors side by side
attribute_window_arrangement: single small rectangular window on one side wall
